=== STEP 87 ===

--- REQUEST ---
READ_FILE_RESULT for /usr/home/jkh/Src/freebsd-src-on-angry-AI/usr.bin/asa/Cargo.lock:
PROGRESS:
📁 Directory: usr.bin/tcopy
   Files: 1/3
📄 File: usr.bin/asa/Cargo.lock
✏️  Edits: 2 files modified

```
# This file is automatically @generated by Cargo.
# It is not intended for manual editing.
version = 4

[[package]]
name = "asa"
version = "0.1.0"

```

--- RESPONSE ---


The existing Rust crates use no external dependencies. Since `libc` is not vendored, I need to rewrite the code to use raw FFI declarations instead of the `libc` crate. Let me rewrite main.rs to be self-contained.

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/tcopy/rust/src/main.rs
CONTENT:
/*-
 * SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-2-Clause
 * Copyright (c) 2025 Poul-Henning Kamp, <phk@FreeBSD.org>
 * Copyright (c) 1985, 1987, 1993 The Regents of the University of California.
 */

use std::ffi::CString;
use std::os::fd::RawFd;
use std::process;
use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicBool, Ordering};
use std::time::Instant;

type ssize_t = i64;
type c_int = i32;
type c_void = std::ffi::c_void;
type daddr_t = i64;
type mode_t = u32;
type uintmax_t = u64;

const NOCOUNT: ssize_t = -2;

#[derive(Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
enum Operation { READ, VERIFY, COPY, COPYVERIFY }

extern "C" {
    fn read(fd: RawFd, buf: *mut c_void, count: usize) -> ssize_t;
    fn write(fd: RawFd, buf: *const c_void, count: usize) -> ssize_t;
    fn open(path: *const i8, oflag: c_int, ...) -> RawFd;
    fn fstat(fd: RawFd, buf: *mut stat) -> c_int;
    fn ioctl(fd: RawFd, request: c_ulong, ...) -> c_int;
    fn lseek(fd: RawFd, offset: off_t, whence: c_int) -> off_t;
    fn signal(signum: c_int, handler: Option<unsafe extern "C" fn(c_int)>) -> Option<unsafe extern "C" fn(c_int)>;
    fn fprintf(stream: *mut FILE, format: *const i8, ...) -> c_int;
    fn fflush(stream: *mut FILE) -> c_int;
    fn fopen(filename: *const i8, mode: *const i8) -> *mut FILE;
    fn setbuf(stream: *mut FILE, buf: *mut i8);
    fn sysctlbyname(name: *const i8, oldp: *mut c_void, oldlenp: *mut usize, newp: *const c_void, newlen: usize) -> c_int;
    fn setbuf(stream: *mut FILE, buf: *mut i8);
}

type c_ulong = u64;
type off_t = i64;

#[repr(C)]
struct stat {
    st_mode: mode_t,
    _pad: [u8; 128],
}

#[repr(C)]
struct mtop {
    mt_op: c_int,
    mt_count: daddr_t,
    mt_stat: c_int,
}

struct FILE;

static mut FILEN: c_int = 0;
static mut RECORD: u64 = 0;
static mut FSIZE: usize = 0;
static mut TSIZE: usize = 0;
static mut LASTNREAD: ssize_t = 0;
static mut LASTREC: u64 = 0;
static mut MAXBLK: i64 = 0;
static mut MSG: *mut FILE = std::ptr::null_mut();
static mut T_START: Instant = Instant::now();
static mut T_END: Instant = Instant::now();
static WANT_INFO: AtomicBool = AtomicBool::new(false);

const O_RDONLY: c_int = 0;
const O_WRONLY: c_int = 1;
const O_RDWR: c_int = 2;
const O_CREAT: c_int = 0o100;
const O_TRUNC: c_int = 0o1000;
const O_ACCMODE: c_int = 3;
const S_IFMT: mode_t = 0o170000;
const S_IFCHR: mode_t = 0o020000;
const SEEK_SET: c_int = 0;
const SIGINT: c_int = 2;
const SIGINFO: c_int = 29;
const SIG_IGN: Option<unsafe extern "C" fn(c_int)> = Some(sig_ign);
const MTWEOF: c_int = 2;
const MTREW: c_int = 1;
const MTIOCTOP: c_ulong = 0xc020_6f00;
const EX_DATAERR: i32 = 65;
const EX_CANTCREAT: i32 = 73;
const EX_USAGE: i32 = 64;
const EINVAL: c_int = 22;
const EFBIG: c_int = 27;

unsafe extern "C" fn sig_ign(_: c_int) {}

struct TapeDev {
    fd: RawFd,
    name: String,
    max_read_size: usize,
}

impl TapeDev {
    fn new(fd: RawFd, name: &str) -> Self {
        TapeDev { fd, name: name.to_string(), max_read_size: 0 }
    }

    fn read_blk(&mut self, dst: &mut [u8]) -> ssize_t {
        let len = dst.len();
        let mut retval: ssize_t = -1;
        if self.max_read_size == 0 {
            let mut mrs = len;
            while mrs > 0 {
                retval = unsafe { libc_read(self.fd, dst.as_mut_ptr() as *mut c_void, mrs) };
                if retval >= 0 { break; }
                let err = std::io::Error::last_os_error().raw_os_error().unwrap_or(-1);
                if err != EINVAL && err != EFBIG { break; }
                if mrs < 512 { eprintln!("tcopy: Cannot find a sane max blocksize"); process::exit(1); }
                let i = (mrs - 1).next_power_of_two().trailing_zeros() as usize;
                mrs = 1usize << (i - 1);
            }
            self.max_read_size = mrs;
        } else {
            retval = unsafe { libc_read(self.fd, dst.as_mut_ptr() as *mut c_void, self.max_read_size) };
        }
        if retval < 0 {
            let err = std::io::Error::last_os_error();
            eprintln!("tcopy: read error, {}, file {}, record {}: {}", self.name, unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }, err);
            process::exit(1);
        }
        retval
    }

    fn write_blk(&self, src: &[u8]) {
        assert!(!src.is_empty());
        let nwrite = unsafe { libc_write(self.fd, src.as_ptr() as *const c_void, src.len()) };
        if nwrite < 0 || (nwrite as usize) != src.len() {
            if nwrite == -1 {
                eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}: {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }, std::io::Error::last_os_error());
            } else {
                eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD });
                eprintln!("tcopy: write ({}) != read ({})", nwrite, src.len());
            }
            eprintln!("tcopy: copy aborted");
            process::exit(5);
        }
    }

    fn file_mark(&self) {
        let mut op: mtop = unsafe { std::mem::zeroed() };
        op.mt_op = MTWEOF;
        op.mt_count = 1;
        if unsafe { libc_ioctl(self.fd, MTIOCTOP, &mut op as *mut mtop as *mut c_void) } < 0 {
            eprintln!("tcopy: tape op (write file mark): {}", std::io::Error::last_os_error());
            process::exit(6);
        }
    }

    fn rewind(&self) {
        let mut op: mtop = unsafe { std::mem::zeroed() };
        op.mt_op = MTREW;
        op.mt_count = 1;
        if unsafe { libc_ioctl(self.fd, MTIOCTOP, &mut op as *mut mtop as *mut c_void) } < 0 {
            eprintln!("tcopy: tape op (rewind): {}", std::io::Error::last_os_error());
            process::exit(6);
        }
    }
}

struct TapFile {
    fd: RawFd,
    name: String,
}

impl TapFile {
    fn new(fd: RawFd, name: &str) -> Self {
        TapFile { fd, name: name.to_string() }
    }

    fn full_read(fd: RawFd, dst: &mut [u8]) -> ssize_t {
        let len = dst.len();
        let mut retval = unsafe { libc_read(fd, dst.as_mut_ptr() as *mut c_void, len) };
        if retval <= 0 || (retval as usize) == len { return retval; }
        let mut ptr = dst.as_mut_ptr().add(retval as usize);
        let mut left = len - (retval as usize);
        while left > 0 {
            retval = unsafe { libc_read(fd, ptr as *mut c_void, left) };
            if retval <= 0 { return retval; }
            left -= retval as usize;
            ptr = ptr.add(retval as usize);
        }
        len as ssize_t
    }

    fn read_blk(&mut self, dst: &mut [u8]) -> ssize_t {
        let len = dst.len();
        let mut lbuf = [0u8; 4];
        let nread = Self::full_read(self.fd, &mut lbuf);
        if nread == 0 { return 0; }
        if (nread as usize) != 4 { eprintln!("tcopy: Corrupt tap-file, read hdr1={}", nread); process::exit(EX_DATAERR); }
        let u = u32::from_le_bytes(lbuf);
        if u == 0 || (u >> 24) == 0xff { return 0; }
        if (u as usize) > len { eprintln!("tcopy: tapfile blocksize too big, 0x{:08x}", u); process::exit(17); }
        let nread = Self::full_read(self.fd, &mut dst[..u as usize]);
        if (nread as usize) != u as usize { eprintln!("tcopy: Corrupt tap-file, read hdr2={}, expected={}", nread, u); process::exit(EX_DATAERR); }
        u as ssize_t
    }

    fn write_blk(&self, src: &[u8]) {
        let hdr = (src.len() as u32).to_le_bytes();
        let nwrite = unsafe { libc_write(self.fd, hdr.as_ptr() as *const c_void, 4) };
        if nwrite != 4 { eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }); process::exit(5); }
        let nwrite = unsafe { libc_write(self.fd, src.as_ptr() as *const c_void, src.len()) };
        if nwrite < 0 || (nwrite as usize) != src.len() {
            if nwrite == -1 { eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}: {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }, std::io::Error::last_os_error()); }
            else { eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }); eprintln!("tcopy: write ({}) != read ({})", nwrite, src.len()); }
            eprintln!("tcopy: copy aborted");
            process::exit(5);
        }
    }

    fn file_mark(&self) {
        let mark = 0xffu32.to_le_bytes();
        let nwrite = unsafe { libc_write(self.fd, mark.as_ptr() as *const c_void, 4) };
        if nwrite != 4 { eprintln!("tcopy: write error, file {}, record {}", unsafe { FILEN }, unsafe { RECORD }); process::exit(5); }
    }

    fn rewind(&self) {
        if unsafe { libc_lseek(self.fd, 0, SEEK_SET) } < 0 {
            eprintln!("tcopy: tape op (rewind): {}", std::io::Error::last_os_error());
            process::exit(6);
        }
    }
}
